decks.notes: This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with a swarm of aggressive goblin creatures. It utilizes cards like Goblin Lackey and Goblin Matron to put powerful goblins into play quickly, while cards like Goblin Piledriver and Goblin Warchief boost their strength. The deck also includes removal spells like Lightning Bolt and Gempalm Incinerator to deal with opposing threats. With a mix of efficient creatures and disruptive lands like Rishadan Port and Wasteland, this deck aims to win the game through a fast and relentless assault.

The deck focuses on utilizing card advantage and disruptive control elements to protect the powerful creature Psychatog. By drawing extra cards with spells like Accumulated Knowledge and Gush, and by disrupting the opponent's game plan with Duress and Counterspells, the deck aims to control the game until it can safely deploy Psychatog and use it to close out the game with its ability to grow in power based on the player's graveyard.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly deal damage to the opponent through aggressive creatures and burn spells. The deck aims to apply constant pressure on the opponent by playing low-cost creatures like Jackal Pup and Mogg Fanatic, backed up by efficient burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Fireblast. The inclusion of powerful damage spells like Ball Lightning and Sulfuric Vortex ensures that the opponent's life total will be quickly depleted. This deck utilizes a combination of creatures and burn spells to create a fast-paced, aggressive strategy that aims to win the game as quickly as possible.

The main focus of this deck is to aggressively control the board and apply pressure on the opponent using small, efficient creatures like Soltari Priest, Silver Knight, and Exalted Angel. Support cards like Mother of Runes and Whipcorder provide protection and disruption, while cards like Meddling Mage and Engineered Plague help to shut down opposing strategies. Additionally, the deck utilizes a mix of mana acceleration with Mox Diamond and land destruction with Wasteland to gain an advantage in the early game. Overall, the strategy revolves around quickly overwhelming the opponent with a swarm of creatures while disrupting their game plan.

The main focus of this deck is to create a powerful engine using enchantments, particularly with the Argothian Enchantress and Enchantress's Presence to draw cards and generate mana from enchantments like Wild Growth. The goal is to eventually set up a lock with cards like Parallax Wave and Solitary Confinement while also using Opalescence and Sterling Grove to control the board. The deck aims to streamline its strategy with cards like Mirri's Guile and Replenish, making it a strong combo deck that can overwhelm opponents with its enchantment-based synergy.

The main concept of this deck is to use Oath of Druids to quickly summon powerful creatures like Terravore and Terravore to overwhelm the opponent. The deck also includes control elements like Swords to Plowshares and Sphere of Resistance to disrupt the opponent's strategy. The mana base is designed to support the deck's strategy with cards like Wasteland and Rishadan Port to disrupt the opponent's lands. The deck aims to control the game until it can drop a powerful creature and quickly close out the game.

The deck focuses on using Oath of Druids to control the opponent's creatures by putting powerful threats into play from the graveyard or library. It utilizes disruption spells and land destruction to slow down the opponent's game plan while setting up its own win conditions. The deck aims to establish a board presence with cards like Terravore and Treetop Village while maintaining card advantage with spells like Sylvan Library. The combination of control elements and efficient threats makes it a strong contender in the premodern format.

The deck focuses on utilizing the combo potential of Replenish to bring back enchantments from the graveyard, such as Parallax Wave, Opalescence, and Decree of Silence, to overwhelm the opponent. The deck includes cards like Attunement and Intuition to help set up the combo pieces in the graveyard, while also packing disruption in the form of Abeyance, Seal of Cleansing, and Swords to Plowshares. The strategy revolves around quickly assembling the combo pieces and utilizing them to control the board and secure victory.

This deck focuses on using cards like Hermit Druid and Phyrexian Dreadnought to quickly fill the graveyard with creatures, then using spells like Reanimate and Shallow Grave to bring back powerful creatures like Sutured Ghoul. Cabal Therapy and Duress help disrupt the opponent's game plan, while cards like Stifle and Vision Charm provide additional control options. The goal is to quickly assemble a powerful board state and overwhelm the opponent before they have a chance to react. The deck's key strength lies in its ability to win quickly and unexpectedly through powerful combo interactions.

The deck focuses on assembling the combo of Hermit Druid, Phyrexian Devourer, and Necrotic Ooze to create an infinite loop that mills the entire library, deals infinite damage, and gains infinite life. The deck utilizes various ways to fill the graveyard, such as Survival of the Fittest and Cabal Therapy, while also including protection and recursion cards like Animate Dead and Karmic Guide. The mana base is designed to support the combo pieces and ensure smooth mana production. Overall, the deck aims to quickly assemble the combo and win the game in a single turn.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game by using counterspells, removal spells, and standstill to prevent the opponent from developing their board state while also using lands like Dust Bowl and Mishra's Factory to establish a strong mana base. The deck aims to stall the game and draw into powerful cards like Fact or Fiction and Decree of Justice to gain card advantage and eventually win the game with powerful finishers like Wrath of God and Standstill triggers. The key strategy is to maintain control of the game while slowly grinding out value over time.

The deck focuses on utilizing the en-Kor creatures to manipulate life totals and fuel combos, primarily with Daru Spiritualist and Task Force to create infinite life gain. The deck also includes a toolbox of creatures that can be searched for with Eladamri's Call and Living Wish. Cabal Therapy is included for disruption and protection, while cards like About Face and Worthy Cause provide additional combo potential. With mana acceleration from Birds of Paradise and lands like Gemstone Mine, the deck aims to quickly assemble its combo pieces for a powerful finish.

The main focus of this deck is to utilize the combo cards Attunement, Parallax Wave, and Replenish to quickly generate a powerful board presence. By using cards like Decree of Silence to control the game and Seal of Cleansing to remove any threats, the deck aims to set up a winning board state while protecting itself from opposing strategies. The synergy between Opalescence and Parallax Wave allows for a strong offense, while cards like Frantic Search and Intuition help to dig for key pieces of the combo.

The focus of this deck is to have a fast and aggressive playstyle, utilizing low-cost creatures and direct damage spells to quickly bring down the opponent's life total. With cards like Ball Lightning, Jackal Pup, and Lightning Bolt, it aims to apply early pressure and close out the game before the opponent has a chance to stabilize. The inclusion of cards like Cursed Scroll and Seal of Fire provide additional reach and versatility in dealing damage. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a relentless assault and efficient burn spells.

The deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana with cards like Mox Diamond and Gemstone Mine to set up for powerful plays like Armageddon, which destroys all lands on the battlefield. This disrupts the opponent's mana base while maintaining your own with cards like Sylvan Library and Weathered Wayfarer. Terravore and Terrageddon capitalize on the land destruction, becoming powerful threats. Aggressive creatures like Nimble Mongoose and Treetop Village provide quick damage, while utility cards like Swords to Plowshares and Naturalize help control the board. The deck aims to overwhelm opponents with early aggression and resource denial.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game by using Oath of Druids to cheat out powerful creatures like Exalted Angel and Terravore. The deck also includes removal spells like Swords to Plowshares and Cataclysm to control the board. The mana base is optimized for consistency and disruption with cards like Rishadan Port and Wasteland. The deck aims to establish a strong board presence while disrupting the opponent's game plan, ultimately leading to victory through overwhelming advantage.
